headline.text: L3 Cute Cavanna was down *6 hours overnight* on incorrect film loading—cleared at 07:02 by day shift.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 cleared a Sollich 2 tunnel jam in 2 hours after cleaning salt-caked rollers. Bequet Caramel BOM still calls for 6.272 lbs salt per batch instead of the customer-specified 8 lbs—team waiting on NIF to update. Piece centering flagged at 13:32, operator adjusting.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 FFS cleared three separate packaging issues across shifts—open bags, gusset problems, and a video jet alignment—each resolved inside 30 minutes. ML2 started day shift with a recipe display error; line ran after disabling shaker #2 but display still showing question marks at window close. Speed door by QA room still inoperable at 07:09, blocking trash removal.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 Cute Cavanna down from 00:16 to 07:02 after maintenance and 3rd shift couldn't fix incorrect film threading; day shift lead corrected setup and trained overnight. ML1 ran 182 molds through wash after chocolate stuck overnight. ML4 had a 31-minute TG4 vacuum jam at 02:24, cleared after cleaning. IMS found 9 unreported scrap barrels and missing label uploads from 3rd shift. Live centipede spotted on ML4 at 01:35. Scissors and two picks still missing from MF Matrix as of shift close.

notes.text: Registration sensor on Theegarden needs to stay on per Cornel tech documentation—first shift corrected after overnight confusion.
Frederick updated ML1 LSW; all outdated copies to be removed from floor and new version printed.

resolved.title: Sollich 2 Tunnel 3 belt stopped, checkweigher faults
resolved.summary: Tunnel 3 drive roller covered in salt and chocolate, stopped belt; multiple checkweigher errors including photo cell faults and reject belt too high.
resolved.resolution: Rollers cleaned and reinstalled by 09:13, checkweigher errors cleared, belt tracking adjusted east—"line is running and tracking looks good" (Katya at 09:23).

resolved.title: Sollich 3 salt buildup on tunnel drive after Level 1 clean
resolved.summary: Drive roller under tunnel belt had salt buildup not addressed in Level 1 clean scope; caused tunnel stop at shift start.
resolved.resolution: Joseph Scott opened RCA at 01:48 with action to add drive cleaning to Level 1 when running sea salt products.

resolved.title: Sollich 2 missing jar roller between blue belts
resolved.summary: Roller missing from jar transition area caused jars to fall; searched but not found by end of 1st shift.
resolved.resolution: Gap closed by 13:53—"jars are no longer tipping over" (Chris Jeffs). Roller not found but line running without it.

resolved.title: FFS bags coming out open
resolved.summary: Seal failure on vertical form-fill-seal, maintenance adjusting temperature.
resolved.resolution: Operator lowered temperature from 305 to 290 at 12:31—"bags are sealed on both sides" (Claudio).

resolved.title: FFS open gussets causing line down
resolved.summary: Gusset sealing problem stopped FFS line at 15:59.
resolved.resolution: Line running better at 17:11 after maintenance adjustments (Mathew Draper).

resolved.title: FFS video jet printer misaligned on box
resolved.summary: Batch code printing off-position, line down for adjustment.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance adjusted, line running again at 18:54—"printing improved on both sides" (Marlenis at 18:59).

resolved.title: FFS weight checker pitch error rejecting good bags
resolved.summary: Weight checker throwing pitch error since shift start, high reject rate of acceptable bags.
resolved.resolution: Reduced PPM from 65 to 60 at 00:16 to manage rejects; line moved back to 65 at 03:15 (Gustavo).

resolved.title: Cute Cavanna not wrapping correctly
resolved.summary: Flow wrap machine down from 00:16, maintenance and 3rd shift operators unable to fix; line sent to rework.
resolved.resolution: Day shift lead corrected at 07:02—film installed incorrectly, rollers marked wrong. "Cute Cavanna is now running" after training 3rd shift lead on correct setup (Grey Boscan).

resolved.title: ML1 Bosch sideways conveyor not moving
resolved.summary: Chocolate buildup causing severe drag prevented conveyor operation.
resolved.resolution: Cleaned and "now good to go" at 07:45 (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna high open-package rate
resolved.summary: 8.5% open units found at 11:17 check, above 1% threshold.
resolved.resolution: Shawn made adjustments to Cavanna; recheck at 13:38 showed 0.95% open rate, below threshold (David Zuniaga).

resolved.title: ML4 TG#3, TG#4, and WDS stopped
resolved.summary: Multiple wrapping machines and depositor stopped at 11:45, techs working.

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna alarm after cleaning scrapers
resolved.summary: Alarm prevented startup after doors opened for scraper cleaning at 14:13.

resolved.title: ML4 TG4 servo splitter issue and film centering
resolved.summary: TG4 servo splitter fixed but film not centered at 22:36, maintenance and operator still adjusting.
resolved.resolution: TG4 running by shift change at 06:28 (ML4 TG).

resolved.title: ML4 TG4 vacuum line clogged with chocolate
resolved.summary: Flow wrap double belt jammed at 02:24 due to clogged vacuum line, 22-minute pause for cleaning.
resolved.resolution: Root cause: product buildup, insufficient cleaning. Equipment cleaned, normal operation resumed. Total downtime 31 minutes (ML4 TG at 02:48).

resolved.title: ML4 mold jam in loading section
resolved.summary: Mold jam at 12:35 in loading section, operators and maintenance responding.
resolved.resolution: Operators used Gameboy with maintenance, cleared in 10 minutes—"running now" at 12:55 (Itzel).

needs_attention.title: Bequet Caramel BOM calling for wrong salt quantity
needs_attention.summary: BOM calls for 6.272 lbs salt per batch; customer spec and floor practice is 8 lbs per batch.
needs_attention.status: Maria asked for NIF with revised quantities to update BOM at 11:33. MRP ordering based on incorrect BOM. No update by window close.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 4 Bequet piece off-center in wrap
needs_attention.summary: Caramel piece not centered within Bequet logo on flow wrap at 13:32.
needs_attention.status: Operator working on adjustment as of 13:35. No confirmation of correction by end of window.

needs_attention.title: Speed door by QA room inoperable
needs_attention.summary: Speed door used for trash removal not operating; maintenance contacted at 13:58.
needs_attention.status: Justin sent maintenance. Still not working at 07:09 follow-up—"only makes noise when you try to open or close it."

needs_attention.title: ML2 depositor recipe name not displaying
needs_attention.summary: WDS showing question marks instead of recipe name at 05:27, line started after disabling shaker #2.
needs_attention.status: Line running but recipe display still showing question marks at 06:32 (Gustavo). Cause unknown.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix missing scissors and two picks
needs_attention.summary: Scissors and two picks missing from MF Matrix since at least 14:10, FOD concern.
needs_attention.status: Still missing as of 14:31 2nd shift. No recovery posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: Live centipede found on ML4 machine
needs_attention.summary: Live centipede discovered on ML4 equipment at 01:35.
needs_attention.status: Reported with photo. No follow-up on pest control response by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 Cavanna finger fell off
needs_attention.summary: Cavanna wrapping finger detached at 01:47, maintenance working on repair.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working on it as of 01:47. No resolution posted by window close at 07:16.

needs_attention.title: ML4 unreported scrap and missing label uploads
needs_attention.summary: IMS found 9 barrels chocolate scrap (only 705 lbs reported), full cream barrel in waste area, and labels not uploaded by 3rd shift.
needs_attention.status: IMS adjusting inventory to match physical counts. Supervisor asked about label uploads, received no response. Still unresolved process issue as of 06:44.
